documentUrlListPaths: ../Knowledge Base/lg_knowledge/LG그룹 9개 상장 계열사 IR 자료 — 문서 단위 URL 목록.md
outputPolicy: This manifest inventories LG local source candidates and reconciles them with document-level URLs where available. It does not grant redistribution rights.
promotionPolicy: No source is runtime knowledge until an atomic source-backed claim is promoted with companyId, companyScope, evidence locator, and rights-safe source metadata.
lgAdapterNotes: LG Electronics, LG Energy Solution, LG H&H, LG CNS, and most LG Corp. files have direct public document URLs.
LG Chem direct files may require an official-site Referer header at collection time, but the artifact still records document-level URLs.
LG Display uses session/S3-style attachment URLs; these remain document-level URLs but may need refresh if stale.
LG Innotek uses POST-style file IDs; the adapter records constructed download endpoints and keeps the source page as the citable route.
LG Uplus uses dynamic browser downloads; rows without document-level URLs remain source-page-only until exact document URLs are supplied.

urlReconciliation.policy: Document-level URLs or official source-page routes are recorded for review. Runtime promotion still requires a source-backed claim and evidence locator.
